evals.prompt: Use squash to pack skills/squash/evals/fixtures/session-normal.txt, then unpack payload and return metadata plus restored context markers and bootstrap instruction text.
evals.expected_output: Produce metadata JSON with payload_path, status ok, and new_session_prompt that tells user to paste restored block as first message; include BEGIN_RESTORED_CONTEXT and END_RESTORED_CONTEXT markers in restore output.

evals.prompt: Use squash to pack skills/squash/evals/fixtures/session-edge.txt, tamper payload, run unpack, and capture integrity error with canonical code.
evals.expected_output: Produce error JSON with status error and code sha256_mismatch.

evals.prompt: Run squash-pack.sh with malformed input (missing --input argument) and return structured error output.
evals.expected_output: Produce error JSON that includes code missing_input.

evals.prompt: Use squash to pack and unpack a larger unicode fixture and verify instruction fidelity for restore command text.
evals.expected_output: Produce metadata JSON that includes exact unpack command path fragment and guidance to paste restored block as first message; restore output includes Ωmega and sha256_valid true.
assertions: contains("pack.json", "BEGIN_RESTORED_CONTEXT and END_RESTORED_CONTEXT as first message")

evals.prompt: Need this moved to new chat with minimal fuss. Use squash flow and return exact first-message bootstrap instruction plus restored block markers.
evals.expected_output: Produce metadata JSON with new_session_prompt containing exact first-message wording and unpack command path; produce restore output with ordered BEGIN/END markers.
assertions: contains("pack.json", "BEGIN_RESTORED_CONTEXT and END_RESTORED_CONTEXT as first message")
